title: Episode 1
overview: A bride and a corpse, a crew of masons in weird costumes, and a mysterious organization called Hoofs hint at some fishy business behind these unusual combinations. And it seems they are all in search of something…

title: Episode 2
overview: As the bride’s identity is slowly revealed, connections between different forces become clear. Her unique power has the potential to end all conflicts, yet it also ignites a war before true peace can be achieved.

title: Episode 3
overview: The war is about to break out. It seems everyone is fighting for a common goal, yet are driven by their own desires. The desire to find themselves, to reunite with lost loved ones, to save the world. However, there’s always a price to be paid…
